goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'arrive by 10:15'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'the copper kettle'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from stevenage
The train should leave on thursday and should arrive by 10:15
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called the copper kettle
Make sure you get price range
